title: valeriana officinalis f. exaltata
intro: Valeriana officinalis f. exaltata, also known as tall valerian, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the valerian family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its sedative and anxiolytic effects, which have been attributed to its valerenic acid and isovaleric acid content. The health benefits of valerian root include improved sleep quality, reduced stress and anxiety, and relief from muscle and joint pain, making it a popular herbal remedy. Valerian root can be prepared in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, capsules, and dried roots, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
